name: python3-sklearn
title: python3-sklearn
summary: Python modules for machine learning and data mining - Python 3
description:
Python modules for machine learning and data mining - Python 3
scikit-learn is a collection of Python modules relevant to
machine/statistical learning and data mining.  Non-exhaustive list of
included functionality:
- Gaussian Mixture Models
- Manifold learning
- kNN
- SVM (via LIBSVM)
.
This package contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sklearn because Python modules for machine learning and data mining - Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sklearn as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sklearn with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sklearn --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
